title: Script Authoring Execution Spec
purpose: Describe the execution chain for producing and compiling skill and script artifacts.
stageNotes: intake binds the harness and target agent model.
spec-binding derives the node contract and file layout.
llm_authoring_decision decides whether a skill, script, or no executable artifact is required.
skill-authoring emits a real skill file.
script-authoring emits an executable script that reads runtime input from environment variables and prints its result to stdout.
compile validates the generated files and writes them to disk.
backtest verifies that the artifacts are usable by runtime.
persist records artifact ids and file paths on the agent node.
